TWN.name: Taiwan
TWN.source: GDP: IMF WEO 2023; arrivals: Taiwan Tourism Administration 2023; HDI: DGBAS national calculation 2022; migrants: NIA foreign residents 2023

PRK.name: North Korea
PRK.source: GDP: Bank of Korea 2023 estimate of North Korea's real GDP (~$23.34bn, the standard external estimate given the DPRK does not publish official GDP figures); arrivals: pre-pandemic (2019) estimate of foreign visitors, ~90% from China, per South Korea's Institute for International Economic Policy. HDI/migrant-stock not reliably estimable — UNDP does not compute an official HDI for North Korea.

VAT.name: Vatican City
VAT.source: GDP: commonly cited estimate of Vatican City's tiny formal economy (~$19.8m); arrivals: ~7 million visitors in 2023 (Vatican Museums/tourism recovery to pre-pandemic levels). HDI/migrant-stock not computed by UNDP/World Bank for the Holy See (population ~880, not a UN member state).
